source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า07.png
grid_source: mk_test/t4/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json
raw_text: ระดับหลังคาน +3.75, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00. เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC. กันสาด ค.ส.ล. Grid callouts along the bottom, left to right: D, C, B, A, with dimension chain 1.50 | 4.00 | 2.00 | 3.50 | 1.50, bracketed as 1.50 (left overhang) | 9.50 (gridD-gridA) | 1.50 (right, beyond gridA). A small hand-drawn roof-slope indicator (a right triangle with a small numeral, stylized/low-resolution) is shown at the high end of the roof, left side of the sheet (near grid D).
description: Side elevation (รูปด้าน 2), running D-C-B-A left to right. Shows the visibly sloped monopitch roofline (high at the D/left end per the slope triangle, low toward A/right), a window opening (callout 1) plus a further window/vent opening (callout 3), a large diagonally cross-braced opening on the right side (the open-sided จอดรถ carport, drawn with corner braces instead of a solid wall), and a concrete canopy (กันสาด ค.ส.ล.) at the right end. Same level datum as รูปด้าน 1.
warnings: PATTERN RECLASSIFIED (t4, 2026-07-08 taxonomy): t3 classified this view as 'unknown' → now 'side_profile' (#8), same reasoning as sibling _หน้า07_elevation1.json.

DISAGREEMENT VS t3 ON ROOF SLOPE NUMERAL: t3 read the small slope-triangle numeral on this view as approximately '9' (degrees). My own independent read of the same tiny stylized numeral could not confidently distinguish it from '6' at this resolution — and the roof_plan sheet (หน้า06) prints an explicit, clearly legible 'SLOPE 6°' label twice for this same roof. Given the roof plan is the higher-confidence, larger-text source for this exact quantity, I am NOT carrying forward t3's '9' reading as a confirmed value here — recording this field as low-confidence/unresolved rather than repeating the earlier guess. Recommend human zoom-review of the original elevation sheet to settle whether the printed glyph is genuinely a different number from the roof plan's 6°, or a rendering/font artifact of the same figure.

The left (D-side) and right (A-side) 1.50 m overhang/extension figures on this sheet match the master grid file's dummy grid 'A'' position (9.5+1.5=11.0) on the A side, but this elevation only extends 1.50 m past grid A — it does NOT show a second 1.50 m segment out to 'A'' (12.5 m). See หน้า09_section2.json for the same observation from a full building cross-section, supporting the master's low-confidence treatment of A''.
Sibling view รูปด้าน 1 is in _หน้า07_elevation1.json.

Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t3's หน้า07_elevation2.json afterward — level datums, grid spans, and general content match; the roof-slope-angle reading is the one point of disagreement, noted above rather than silently adopted.
